primary.axis_differ: I2S substitution: CmpLogObserver + AFLppCmplogTracingStage + I2SRandReplace mutator added on top of value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback

hypothesis.mechanism: The blocker requires the input to lay out a chain of CHAIN_LEN multi-byte tokens at fixed offsets, each drawn from a compile-time dictionary, with separator bytes between them. Each slot's token is checked by one strncmp/memcmp -- one I2S dictionary entry per slot. cmplog's CmpLogObserver logs each token literal and I2SRandReplace splices it into a candidate input offset in O(1) per slot; total yield over CHAIN_LEN slots is roughly linear in CHAIN_LEN. value_profile alone has no dictionary; CMP_MAP records per-edge Hamming distance, but the gradient at slot i is a SEPARATE coverage edge from slot j, so flipping bits in slot i gives no signal until slot 0..i-1 land. Each slot's gradient is an independent ~256-step-per-byte search over 4 bytes; compounding across CHAIN_LEN independent slots gives exponential decay in CHAIN_LEN. vpc/vp ratio therefore grows as ~256^(4*CHAIN_LEN) -- monotone increasing, divergent at large CHAIN_LEN. Real-target origin: libpcap gencode.c:841 (br799), `bpf_optimize == -1`. Side-A (vp) seeds carry filterSize=1 -> empty filter -> trivial 0-return, F-side. Side-B (vpc) seeds carry filterSize=9 with ASCII filter `0=01%4*0` -- a 4-token grammar chain (NUM `=` NUM `%` NUM `*` NUM) compiling to BPF code with `BPF_MOD K==0`, caught by optimize.c:809 opt_error -> longjmp -> -1 -> T-side.
hypothesis.program_feature_parameter: CHAIN_LEN -- number of dependent slots, each requiring a 4-byte literal-equality match from a compile-time dictionary, that must ALL land before the trap-side becomes reachable
hypothesis.predicted_direction: A>B (vpc beats vp) at every CHAIN_LEN; A/B ratio grows monotonically with CHAIN_LEN, diverging as vp's exponential decay overtakes vpc's linear decay

predicted_endpoints.CHAIN_LEN=1: vpc and vp both resolve readily; ratio ~1-3x. A single 4-byte equality CMP is tractable for vp's gradient within 600s.
predicted_endpoints.CHAIN_LEN=8: vpc still resolves at geometric rate (one I2S substitute per slot times 8 slots); vp ~0 within budget. Ratio diverges.

hypothesis.tradeoff_observation: At the originating real-target branch the (cmplog, naive) edge would carry the same I2S delta. The strict-2-fuzzer rule keeps the per-pair claims separate.

_verdict_history.v1_2026_05_05: refuted — independent per-slot memcmps in a short-circuit chain. Each slot had its own coverage-edge'd branch; vp's CMP_MAP retained slot-k partial-match seeds and solved the chain sequentially. Observed flat ratio ~5x across CHAIN_LEN ∈ {1,2,4,8}; vp medians non-zero and non-monotone (6078/6864/3513/6666). Both falsification triggers from the original acceptance rule fired.
_verdict_history.v2_2026_05_05: reproduced — single-PC noinline check_one_slot + AND-accumulator (no short-circuit). All per-slot equality CMPs share one source-PC; cmp_map retains only the most-recent operand pair. No intermediate per-slot branches. Per-slot literals still I2S-substitutable. Observed vp = 0 at every CHAIN_LEN (including L=1!); vpc curve degrades 22158 → 28666 → 8814 → 6 (geometric decay matching predicted linear-in-CHAIN_LEN substitution rate). All four revised acceptance clauses pass.

verification._v2_4fuzzer_completion_2026_05_09: naive + cmplog data added 2026-05-09 to fill out the 4-fuzzer table. Original v2 ran only the (vpc, vp) primary pair; this extension confirms naive=vp=0 at every dose, cmp resolves at L1-L4 then dies at L8, vpc strictly > cmp at every L (2-3x at low L, infinite at L=8). Synergy story (cmp + vp > cmp alone) reproduced cleanly. See notes/benchmark_verification_log.md 2026-05-09 entry.

summary.headline: v2 (AND-accumulator + single-PC slot-check harness) reproduces the chain-length compounding mechanism cleanly. vp finds ZERO crashes across all 20 trials at all 4 doses; vpc resolves at every dose with curve 22158 → 28666 → 8814 → 6 (geometric decay matching predicted linear-in-CHAIN_LEN substitution rate). vpc/vp ratio is infinite at every dose. v1 → v2 transition validates the methodology lesson: chain-length compounding IS real but only manifests when per-slot CMPs are not coverage-edge'd.
summary.direction_held: all 4 doses (vpc >>> vp at every CHAIN_LEN)
summary.monotonicity: vp curve trivially monotone non-increasing at 0; vpc curve geometric-decay 22k → 28k → 8k → 6 (slight non-monotonicity at l1→l2 from throughput noise; from l2 onward strictly monotone-decreasing as predicted)
summary.deviation_from_prediction: vpc median at L=8 is 6 (very close to vp's 0). At this throughput level, more trials would tighten the lower bound on the ratio. The predicted polynomial-decay-in-vpc curve holds qualitatively.
acceptance_clauses_passed: (1) vpc median > 0 at every CHAIN_LEN: PASS (22158, 28666, 8814, 6 — all positive)
(2) vp median monotone non-increasing: PASS (trivially — 0 at every dose)
(3) vpc/vp ratio monotone non-decreasing: PASS (infinite at every dose)
(4) vp ~ 0 OR vpc/vp >= 100 at CHAIN_LEN=8: PASS (vp = 0 at L=8)
summary.verdict_rationale: REPRODUCED-v2 (strongest possible — vp = 0 at every dose). Mechanism: vp's CMP_MAP at the single shared CMP source-PC retains only the most-recent operand pair, so per-slot gradient buckets cannot accumulate across the chain. vp must hit ALL CHAIN_LEN slots simultaneously by random byte mutation (~1/256^(4*CHAIN_LEN)), which is below the 600s budget even at L=1 with 4 bytes. vpc's I2SRandReplace logs each KEYWORDS[i] literal and substitutes them at any input offset in O(1) per slot, resolving the chain in CHAIN_LEN substitution events.
summary.v1_v2_combined_finding: v1 refutation + v2 reproduction together demonstrate: (a) the chain-length compounding mechanism is GENUINE — vp's gradient cannot scale to multi-slot search when slots are coverage-edge-decoupled from each other; (b) v1's flat-ratio result was an HARNESS ARTIFACT (per-slot edges decoupling the gradient), not a flaw in the underlying mechanism prediction; (c) real-target divergences with chain structure (e.g. libpcap pcap_compile parser) likely fall in the v1-shape regime — sequential parser CMPs each emit their own coverage edge, so the divergence at those branches is captured by per-slot mechanisms (i2s_magic_number_gate on each token width) rather than chain-length-as-knob. v2 establishes the chain-length axis as a synthesizable mechanism but documents that real targets typically don't expose it cleanly.

notes: Source-only hypothesis: Side-B vpc seeds for libpcap br799 carry a parseable filter expression `0=01%4*0` whose grammar tokens (NUM `=` NUM `%` NUM `*` NUM) form a 4-step chain through pcap_compile, with the optimizer trap firing on a divisor-zero constant-fold. Side-A vp seeds carry filterSize=1 (empty filter), reaching the branch but taking the F (success) side because empty filters compile trivially.

Orthogonal-axis design: i2s_magic_number_gate fixes CHAIN_LEN=1 and varies KEYWORD_LEN (cmp vs naive on I2S delta). i2s_pair_relational_lookup fixes CHAIN_LEN=2 and varies DICT_SIZE (vpc vs vp on I2S delta, same primary pair as this template). This template fixes KEYWORD_LEN=4 and DICT_SIZE=8 and varies CHAIN_LEN -- the third orthogonal axis on the same I2S-helps mechanism family.

Methodology lesson: chain-length-axis predictions only compound exponentially when slot CMPs are CO-DEPENDENT (failing slot k makes the input fail before reaching slot k+1's CMP, but coverage feedback collapses the chain by retaining intermediate slot-k seeds). The libpcap real target's actual divergence driver is therefore NOT chain depth — likely the lexer's keyword dictionary content (i2s_magic_number_gate axis on the per-slot keyword) or the optimizer's constant-fold reachability (a different mechanism family).

Falsification path TRIGGERED: vp non-zero AND non-monotone — the chain-length axis is not what controls the divergence. The (vpc, vp) divergence at libpcap br799 is real (per the originating subject_branches row) but is captured by other templates (i2s_magic_number_gate's KEYWORD_LEN axis on per-slot literals) or remains unexplained on the chain-length axis specifically.
